title: cynorkis andohahelensis
intro: Cynorkis andohahelensis, also known as the Andohahela Cynorkis, is a species of orchid native to Madagascar. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Cynorkis andohahelensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are commonly used in teas and infusions, while its leaves can be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
